title: One Damned Day at Dawn... Django Meets Sartana!
original_title: Quel maledetto giorno d'inverno... Django e Sartana all'ultimo sangue
overview: The small desert town of Black City is held in a reign of terror by a nasty gang of criminals lead by the ruthless Bud Willer. Earnest, but inexperienced Sheriff Jack Ronson arrives in town to establish law and order. Mysterious bounty hunter Django helps Ronson out.
